scimetr 1.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • Bibliometric analysis with R
    • Creación de la BD empleando la API de WoS (obsoleto)
    • Downloading data from the Web of Science
  • Changelog

Package index

Bibliographic data

Main utilities for importing data and creating databases.

scimetr-package scimetr
scimetr: Analysis of Scientific Publication Data with R
ImportSources.wos()
Import bibliographic data downloaded from Web of Science (WoS).
CreateDB() print(<wos.db>) plot(<wos.db>)
Bibliographic data base creation
CreateDBJCR()
Import JCR data from Web of Science (WoS)
AddDBJCR() plot(<wos.jcr>)
Add JCR data to a bibliographic database

Summaries

Global and yearly summaries.

summary(<wos.db>) print(<summary.wos.db>) TC.authors() plot(<summary.wos.db>) summary(<wos.jcr>) print(<summary.wos.jcr>) plot(<summary.wos.jcr>)
Summaries of a bibliographic database
summary_year() print(<summary.year.wos>) plot(<summary.year.wos>) print(<summary.year.jcr>) plot(<summary.year.jcr>)
Summaries per year

Data retrieval

Functions to perform database queries.

get.idDocs() get.idAuthors() get.idAddresses() get.idAreas() get.idCategories() get.idWSI() get.idSources() get.idOI() get.idRI() get.idAffiliations()
Get table identifiers
get_jcr() get_jcr_cat()
Get JCR metrics

Data

Examples of data and databases.

wosdf
Mathematics UDC WoS Core Collection 2018-2023 data
dbjcr
Mathematics UDC 2018-2023 bibliographic database

On this page

Developed by Ruben Fernandez-Casal, Borja Lafuente-Rego, Maria Jose Lombardia, Javier Tarrio-Saavedra, Julian Costa-Bouzas.
